multiplot 0.3.3
  • Get started
  • Reference

Package index

Style Entry Point

ggchoice()
Apply a software-specific plot style

Prism Geoms

geom_errorbar_prism()
Prism-style T-bar error bars
geom_col_prism()
Prism-style column bars
geom_boxplot_prism()
Prism-style boxplot

Statistical Annotations

stat_compare_means_prism()
Prism-style statistical comparison annotations

Continuous Scales

scale_color_academic_c() scale_fill_academic_c()
Academic grayscale continuous colour scale
scale_color_matlab_c() scale_fill_matlab_c()
MATLAB parula-style continuous colour scale
scale_color_medcalc_c() scale_fill_medcalc_c()
MedCalc-style continuous colour scale
scale_color_minitab_c() scale_fill_minitab_c()
Minitab-style continuous colour scale
scale_color_origin_c() scale_fill_origin_c()
OriginPro-style continuous colour scale
scale_color_prism_c() scale_fill_prism_c()
Prism-style continuous colour scale
scale_color_stata_c() scale_fill_stata_c()
Stata-style continuous colour scale

Shape Scales

scale_shape_prism() scale_shape_spss() scale_shape_origin() scale_shape_stata() scale_shape_academic() scale_shape_sigmaplot() scale_shape_jmp() scale_shape_matlab() scale_shape_minitab() scale_shape_medcalc()
Software-specific point shape scales
